hooks.command: cd "C:/Users/alexl/Documents/Algo Workspace" && pnpm exec prettier --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'content/.*\.json$' && cd "C:/Users/alexl/Documents/Algo Workspace" && pnpm validate-content 2>&1 | head -20 || true
